content.text:
{"name": "write_file", "arguments": {"path": "solution.py", "content": "# TokenBucket implementation from https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Token_bucket
import asyncio
from aiohttp import ClientSession, ClientResponse
class RateLimiter:
    def __init__(self, max_calls: int, period: float):
        self.max_calls = max_calls
        self.period = period
        self.token_bucket = asyncio.Queue(maxsize=max_calls)
        for _ in range(max_calls):  # Pre-fill the bucket
            self.token_bucket.put_nowait(None)
        self.lock = asyncio.Lock()

    async def acquire(self):
        while True:
            try:
                await self.token_bucket.get(timeout=self.period)
                break
            except asyncio.TimeoutError:
                pass
        return self

    async def __aexit__(self, exc_type, exc_value, traceback):
        if not self.token_bucket.full():  # Refill the bucket carefully
            async with self.lock:
                for _ in range(min(len(self.token_bucket), int(self.period / asyncio.get_running_loop().time() - (await self.token_bucket.get()).creation_time()))):  # Calculate needed tokens to refill
                    await self.token_bucket.put(None)
"}}}
{"name": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "python3 -c "from solution import *; exec(open('validate.py').read())""}}
